title: Happy Birthday
description: Organize your holiday on your server!
body:
## Celebrate your party on the server with this plugin!
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/w0UGcZ8fFu0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Features
### Balloons
Throw the ball away to send it flying freely.\
It will burst with a sound when it passes a specified number of blocks.\
Permission: `aniby.birthday.balloons`\
![Mechanic of balloons](https://i.imgur.com/vXvbLEr.gif)

### Piece of Cake
Right click on cake while sneaking with empty hand to get a piece of cake into your inventory.\
Right click to launch a piece of cake. If a piece hits a player, he restores 1 hunger level and 0.2 saturation.\
Permission: `aniby.birthday.piece_of_cake`\
![Fight with pieces of cake](https://i.imgur.com/C7G0sIk.gif)

### Party Blower
Right click to make a festive blower sound.\
Permission: `aniby.birthday.party_blower`
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/-OvOeeGVSaI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

> All mechanics accessible also with OP or `aniby.birthday.all` permission.
### Hats
Available via `/burthday` command.
### `/birthday` command
Gives out the items listed above\
Usage: `/burthday [<itemName>] [<count>]`\
Permission: `aniby.birthday.give`

## Installation
1. Download and drag `.jar` file to `plugins/` folder;
2. Download and install `.zip` file to your `resourcepacks/` folder or set `resource-pack` field in your `server.properties`;
3. Reload your server;
4. Enjoy new things!
